name: AlphaSense, Inc.
lede: AlphaSense runs two centers across two Indian cities. Pune and Bengaluru, covering GCC/GIC and IT, built over seven years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AlphaSense office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AlphaSense, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AlphaSense runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Pune, Bengaluru), covering GCC/GIC and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: AlphaSense's India footprint covers Pune and Bengaluru, spanning GCC/GIC and IT. The centers deliver IT for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does AlphaSense operate in India?
faq.a: AlphaSense operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AlphaSense have centers in?
faq.a: AlphaSense's India footprint includes Pune and 1 additional city.

faq.q: What types of centers does AlphaSense run in India?
faq.a: AlphaSense runs GCC/GIC and 1 additional center type in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AlphaSense's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for AlphaSense's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AlphaSense's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at AlphaSense's India centers, across HR and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
